steps.title: Make a two-point table
steps.content: Use Desmos to fit the exponential model. On day $0$, there are $233$ views. Every $2$ days, the number is multiplied by $1.70$, so on day $2$ there are $233(1.70)=396.1$ views.

steps.title: Use a custom regression for two-day growth
steps.content: Because the growth period is $2$ days, type $y_1\sim a b^{x_1/2}$. Desmos returns $a=233$ and $b=1.70$, giving $f(x)=233(1.70)^{x/2}$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Choice C has the correct starting value, multiplier, and exponent. Choices A and B use decay factor $0.70$, and choice D uses exponent $2x$ instead of $x/2$, so choice C is correct.
